frontMatter.title: Using MySQL Database with Docker
frontMatter.summary: Last Saturday I was attending a workshop for Spring Boot in Makers Institute Bandung. The prerequisite for the workshop is we have the tools installed on our private machine. Besides the obvious Java, we also have to install MySQL.

prev.title: Multiple Dex Files Defined in Build Config
prev.summary: Have you ever encounter an error like this?

next.title: A Model for Your View
next.summary: Not so long ago, on my Android's MVP architecture, my view layer does not have a model. The view only renders what the presenter tell them to do which is good because then, we have a passive view. But, there's no representation of the view itself.
